# cpg

```go
import "github.com/hoangharry-tm/zerotrust/pkg/cpg"
```

Package cpg defines the shared Code Property Graph interface consumed by both the pattern and semantic detection paths. The Joern engine \(internal/pattern/joern\) is the sole implementor; both paths read from the same graph without re\-parsing.

<a name="CallGraph"></a>
## type [CallGraph](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L78>)

CallGraph maps each function identifier to the identifiers of functions it calls.

```go
type CallGraph map[string][]string
```

<a name="Edge"></a>
## type [Edge](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L68-L75>)

Edge is a directed relationship between two CPG nodes.

```go
type Edge struct {
    FromID string
    ToID   string
    // Type is one of the EdgeType constants above.
    Type EdgeType
    // Label carries optional PDG variable names or taint labels.
    Label string
}
```

<a name="EdgeType"></a>
## type [EdgeType](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L23>)

EdgeType classifies a directed relationship between two CPG nodes.

```go
type EdgeType string
```

<a name="EdgeAST"></a>EdgeType constants for CPG directed\-relationship classification.

```go
const (
    EdgeAST   EdgeType = "AST"   // abstract syntax tree containment
    EdgeCFG   EdgeType = "CFG"   // control-flow successor
    EdgePDG   EdgeType = "PDG"   // program-dependence (data + control)
    EdgeCall  EdgeType = "CALL"  // inter-procedural call edge
    EdgeReach EdgeType = "REACH" // reaching-definition (taint propagation)
)
```

<a name="Graph"></a>
## type [Graph](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L135-L170>)

Graph is the read interface shared by both detection paths. The Joern HTTP client \(internal/pattern/joern\) is the only implementation.

Both Path A and Path B acquire a Graph from joern.Client.Graph\(\) immediately after BuildCPG completes; they share the same underlying connection.

```go
type Graph interface {
    // QueryNodes returns all nodes of the given type across all files.
    QueryNodes(nodeType NodeType) ([]Node, error)

    // QueryNodesByFile returns all nodes of nodeType in the given source file.
    // relPath is relative to the project root.
    QueryNodesByFile(relPath string, nodeType NodeType) ([]Node, error)

    // QueryEdges returns directed edges where fromID and toID match.
    // Pass "" to match any node on that side (wildcard).
    QueryEdges(fromID, toID string) ([]Edge, error)

    // GetCallGraph returns the full inter-procedural call graph.
    GetCallGraph() (CallGraph, error)

    // GetCallers returns all functions that directly call functionID.
    GetCallers(functionID string) ([]Node, error)

    // GetCallees returns all functions directly called by functionID.
    GetCallees(functionID string) ([]Node, error)

    // GetNeighboursAtDepth performs a BFS from rootID up to depth hops
    // in both caller and callee directions. Used by the incremental CPG patch
    // and the Call Chain Context Assembler.
    GetNeighboursAtDepth(rootID string, depth int) ([]Node, error)

    // TaintPaths runs inter-procedural taint analysis from each source to each
    // sink and returns all discovered source-to-sink paths.
    // Sanitizer nodes on a path set TaintPath.Sanitized = true.
    TaintPaths(sources []TaintSource, sinks []TaintSink) ([]TaintPath, error)

    // PreFlaggedSinks returns all dangerous sink nodes that Tree-sitter
    // flagged before the CPG build. These are always in scope regardless of
    // module segmentation mode.
    PreFlaggedSinks() ([]TaintSink, error)
}
```

<a name="IncrementalPatchConfig"></a>
## type [IncrementalPatchConfig](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L119-L128>)

IncrementalPatchConfig controls the depth\-5 BFS CPG patch for repeat scans. Depth 5 is the taint\-correctness bound from Li et al. \(ICSE 2024\) and Effendi et al. \(SOAP/PLDI 2025\). Hub\-module fallback triggers when any changed function has ≥50 callers.

```go
type IncrementalPatchConfig struct {
    // ChangedFunctions lists the function identifiers to patch from.
    ChangedFunctions []string
    // MaxDepth is the BFS traversal depth (default 5; must not exceed 6).
    MaxDepth int
    // HubCallerThreshold triggers full rebuild when exceeded (default 50).
    HubCallerThreshold int
    // SerializedCPGPath is the file path for loading and saving the CPG snapshot.
    SerializedCPGPath string
}
```

<a name="Node"></a>
## type [Node](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L50-L65>)

Node is a single vertex in the Code Property Graph.

```go
type Node struct {
    // ID is the Joern-assigned vertex identifier.
    ID  string
    // Type classifies the node's structural role.
    Type NodeType
    // Name is the symbol name (function name, variable name, literal value, etc.).
    Name string
    // File is the source file path (relative to project root).
    File string
    // Line is the 1-based line number.
    Line int
    // Language is the detected source language (e.g. "python", "java", "go").
    Language string
    // Code is the raw source snippet for this node (populated on demand).
    Code string
}
```

<a name="NodeType"></a>
## type [NodeType](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L7>)

NodeType classifies a CPG vertex by its structural role.

```go
type NodeType string
```

<a name="NodeMethod"></a>NodeType constants for CPG vertex classification.

```go
const (
    NodeMethod      NodeType = "METHOD"
    NodeCall        NodeType = "CALL"
    NodeIdentifier  NodeType = "IDENTIFIER"
    NodeParameter   NodeType = "PARAMETER"
    NodeLiteral     NodeType = "LITERAL"
    NodeReturn      NodeType = "RETURN"
    NodeBlock       NodeType = "BLOCK"
    NodeFieldAccess NodeType = "FIELD_ACCESS"
    NodeControlFlow NodeType = "CONTROL_STRUCTURE"
)
```

<a name="SinkKind"></a>
## type [SinkKind](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L36>)

SinkKind categorises a dangerous sink node found during pre\-flagging. Tree\-sitter pre\-flags these before the CPG build so they are always in scope.

```go
type SinkKind string
```

<a name="SinkSQL"></a>SinkKind constants for dangerous sink classification.

```go
const (
    SinkSQL             SinkKind = "sql"             // database query sink
    SinkCommand         SinkKind = "command"         // OS command execution sink
    SinkDeserialization SinkKind = "deserialization" // unsafe deserialization
    SinkFileWrite       SinkKind = "file_write"      // arbitrary file write
    SinkTemplate        SinkKind = "template"        // server-side template injection
    SinkRedirect        SinkKind = "redirect"        // open redirect
    SinkEval            SinkKind = "eval"            // dynamic code evaluation
)
```

<a name="TaintPath"></a>
## type [TaintPath](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L103-L113>)

TaintPath is a single source\-to\-sink data\-flow path returned by taint analysis.

```go
type TaintPath struct {
    // Source is the untrusted-data entry point.
    Source TaintSource
    // Sink is the dangerous consumption point.
    Sink TaintSink
    // IntermediateNodes are the CPG nodes traversed between source and sink,
    // in order of traversal.
    IntermediateNodes []Node
    // Sanitized is true when at least one sanitizer node was detected on the path.
    Sanitized bool
}
```

<a name="TaintSink"></a>
## type [TaintSink](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L92-L100>)

TaintSink describes a dangerous data\-consumption point.

```go
type TaintSink struct {
    // NodeID is the CPG node that consumes (potentially tainted) data.
    NodeID string
    // Kind is one of the SinkKind constants.
    Kind SinkKind
    // File and Line locate the sink in the codebase.
    File string
    Line int
}
```

<a name="TaintSource"></a>
## type [TaintSource](<https://github.com/hoangharry-tm/ZeroTrust.sh/blob/main/pkg/cpg/cpg.go#L81-L89>)

TaintSource describes an untrusted data entry point.

```go
type TaintSource struct {
    // NodeID is the CPG node that introduces untrusted data.
    NodeID string
    // Kind describes the source type (e.g. "http_param", "env_var", "file_read").
    Kind string
    // File and Line locate the source in the codebase.
    File string
    Line int
}
```
